zh.lifeSummary: 當Constanza de Béarn於從1245年到1255年出生在法國阿奎泰貝阿時，她的父親Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn34歲，母親Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre27歲。她於1253年與Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年4月25日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constanza de Béarn于从1245年到1255年出生在法国阿奎泰貝阿时，她的父亲Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn34岁，母亲Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre27岁。她于1253年与Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年4月25日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béarn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname for a bearded man (from Middle English berd, Old English beard). To be clean-shaven was the norm in non-Jewish communities in northwestern Europe from the 12th to the 16th century, the crucial period for surname formation. There is a placename and other evidence to show that this word was used as a byname in the Old English period, when beards were the norm; in this period the byname would have referred to a large or noticeable beard. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates and equivalents in other languages, in particular German Barth 1.

habitational name from a place called Beard in Derbyshire (now represented by Beard Hall and Beardwood Farms in New Mills parish), which derives its name by dissimilation from Old English brerd ‘rim, bank’.

variants.name: Bardwell
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bardwell in Suffolk, so named with an unattested Old English byname Bearda, a derivative of beard (see Beard ) + Old English well(a) ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, the first element may be from a dissimilated form of Old English bre(o)rd ‘brim, bank’.

variants.name: Barth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Florian, Gerhard, Gunther, Klaus, Manfred, Armin, Arno.

German and Swiss German: nickname for a bearded man, from Middle High German bart ‘beard’. This name, which can not be always distinguished from 2 and 4 below, is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia, in the last four countries sometimes as a German translation of Slavic surnames meaning ‘beard’ or ‘bearded man’ (see Bart 1). See also Beard 1.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Pomerania.

variants.name: Bard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Aime, Alphonse, Alphy, Armand, Cecile, Celestine, Emile, Fernand, Germaine, Gilles, Jacques.

English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Old French personal name Bard(e), ancient Germanic Bardo, from barta ‘battle axe’. This was borne as a surname by a prominent Norman family with lands in west Normandy and in various English and Scottish counties, including Essex, Hertfordshire, North Yorkshire, Northumberland, and Lanarkshire. In Scotland the original family were Norman landowners in Strathaven parish in Lanarkshire. They were descended from the Baards, lords of Loftus in the North Yorkshire, descendants of the mid 12th-century Richard Baart.
Irish: altered form of either   Beard   or   Baird  .

variants.name: Bearb
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aurelien, Camille, Micheline, Pierre.
Altered form of English Beard , under the influence, in LA, of French barbe ‘beard’.

nameMeanings.name: Constanza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Constanza de Béarn was born from 1245 to 1255, in Béarn, Aquitaine, France, her father, Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn, was 34 and her mother, Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre, was 27. She married Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL in 1253. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 25 April 1310, in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constanza de Béarn est née du 1245 au 1255, à Béarn, Aquitaine, France, son père, Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL en 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1310, à Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constanza de Béarn von 1245 bis 1255 in Béarn, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn 34 und ihre Mutter Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre 27. Sie hat 1253 Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. April 1310 in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL nel 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1310, nel Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Constanza de Béarn(이)가 1245년 부터 1255년 까지 프랑스 아키테인 브e아른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1253년 Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 4월 25일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 랜데스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constanza de Béarn nasceu de 1245 a 1255, em Béarn, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL em 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1310, em Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constanza de Béarn родилась с 1245 по 1255 в местности бeарн, аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Âlvar II Rodrigue de Cabrera I Giron D'URGELL в 1253 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 апреля 1310 г. в местности ландесь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.
